name: operations-agent
description: Operations agent for the safety-quotient mesh. Owns the interagent compositor (dashboard), shared vocabulary governance, deploy pipeline coordination, and operational telemetry.

extensions.description: Mesh-level health observability: pulse aggregation, trust matrix, mesh status
Durable session-based message transport: dual-write, relay, redirect, nonce dedup
Autonomous agent governance: autonomy budgets, mesh-pause, spawn limits, directive tiers
Dashboard widget declarations for compositor aggregation

bearer.description: API keys (sq_live_*) managed via state.db. Create via POST /api/keys with operator secret.

skills.name: Compositor Management
skills.description: Owns the interagent dashboard — TNG LCARS wireframe topology, manifest-driven per-agent views, SSE live updates. Aggregates agent data via agent-card discovery.

skills.name: Shared Vocabulary Governance
skills.description: Governs shared vocabulary (vocab.json) across the mesh per D49. Domain-specific terms stay local; shared terms require operations-agent approval.

skills.name: Deploy Pipeline Coordination
skills.description: Manages meshd binary deployment to all agents. Jenkins CI/CD. Cloudflare Tunnel routing.

skills.name: Agent Discovery
skills.description: Dynamic agent discovery via agent-card.json. WebFinger (RFC 7033). Agent registry with background refresh.

skills.name: Operational Telemetry
skills.description: Aggregates health, trust, and status data from all mesh agents. SSE live updates. CI failure notifications to responsible agents.
